# Copy System

See `.claude/skills/award-website-os/references/03-copy-conversion-master.md` for the formulas and rules.

## Voice

- Tone: <FILL IN — e.g. confident, quiet, dry, warm, direct>
- Person: <FILL IN — we / you / I / brand-as-character>
- Banned words: <FILL IN — seamless, innovative, next-generation, world-class without proof, etc.>
- Signature phrasing patterns: <FILL IN>

## Hero copy

H1: <FILL IN>

Sub-headline (1–2 lines): <FILL IN>

Primary CTA text: <FILL IN — never "Learn more">
Secondary CTA text (if any): <FILL IN>

Above-the-fold trust signal (if any): <FILL IN>

5-second test answers:
1. What is this?
2. Who is it for?
3. Why should I care?
4. What do I do next?

## Section copy

Use the archetype from `research-brief.md` § Recommended sections.

### Section 1 — <name>
Purpose: <what user doubt this answers>
Headline: <FILL IN>
Body: <FILL IN — 1–3 short paragraphs>
CTA / next step (if any): <FILL IN>

### Section 2 — <name>
Purpose:
Headline:
Body:
CTA:

### Section 3 — <name>
Purpose:
Headline:
Body:
CTA:

(continue as needed)

## Proof copy

Source of proof: <FILL IN — real metrics / case studies / before-after / process detail / founder note / quiet proof>

If quiet proof is used, list the specific quiet-proof items:
- <FILL IN — process detail, methodology, founder note, FAQ items, sample workflow, etc.>

Fake proof check: <FILL IN — confirm no invented metrics, no invented logos, no AI-generated people-as-real, no invented testimonials>

## FAQ (if present)

Each FAQ answers a real objection from the research-brief. Avoid generic FAQs.

| # | Question | Answer |
|---|---|---|
| 1 |  |  |
| 2 |  |  |

## CTAs (all on the site)

| Location | Text | Action |
|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |

## SEO / metadata

- Title tag: <FILL IN, under 60 chars>
- Meta description: <FILL IN, under 160 chars, persuasive, includes primary intent>
- OG title: <FILL IN>
- OG description: <FILL IN>
- OG image direction: <FILL IN — describe; the actual file is in asset-ledger.csv>

## 404 page copy (designed, not generic)

<FILL IN — reuse the concept motif; offer a real path back>

## Footer copy

<FILL IN — final voice moment, useful contact, sitemap, legal>

## Anti-genericity self-check

Run the "only this business" test on every section:
- Could the copy be pasted unchanged onto a competitor? <FILL IN — sections that fail this test must be rewritten>
